nasb.text: Then all the men of his city shall stone him to death; so you shall remove the evil from your midst, and all Israel will hear of it and fear.

esv.text: Then all the men of the city shall stone him to death with stones. So you shall purge the evil from your midst, and all Israel shall hear, and fear.

cnv.text: 全城的人就要用石頭打死他；這樣，你就把那惡從你們中間除掉。以色列眾人聽見了，就都懼怕。

ccb.text: 全城的人都要用石头打死他，从你们中间除掉这种罪恶。所有以色列人听说后，都会感到害怕。
